query: INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_auth.user_platform_consents (id, user_id, platform_id, client_id, granted_scopes, consented_at, revoked_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE granted_scopes = VALUES(granted_scopes), consented_at = VALUES(consented_at), revoked_at = VALUES(revoked_at)
